source_old_req:
The component A must satisfy the following environmental assumptions and guarantees:  
Assume that the input signal Input has a value strictly less than 20.  
Guarantee that the output signal Output has a value less than twice the value of the input signal Input (i.e., Output < 2 * Input).
natural_requirement: The component A must satisfy the following environmental assumptions and guarantees: Assume that the input signal Input has a value strictly less than 20. Guarantee that the output signal Output has a value less than twice the value of the input signal Input (i.e., Output < 2 * Input).

requirement_items.text:
The component A must satisfy the following environmental assumptions and guarantees:  
Assume that the input signal Input has a value strictly less than 20.  
Guarantee that the output signal Output has a value less than twice the value of the input signal Input (i.e., Output < 2 * Input).

expected_check.note: Existing requirement kept because it is explicit and non-vague.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The component A must satisfy the following environmental assumptions and guarantees: Assume that the input signal Input has a value strictly less than 20. Guarantee that the output signal Output has a value less than twice the value of the input signal Input (i.e., Output < 2 * Input).

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The component A must satisfy the following environmental assumptions and guarantees: Assume that the input signal Input has a value strictly less than 20. Guarantee that the output signal Output has a value less than twice the value of the input signal Input (i.e., Output < 2 * Input).

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
